package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for buffer_write_string_single_byte_literal: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `bytes.Buffer.WriteString("x")` for single-byte literals instead of `WriteByte`.
type CaseBufferWriteStringSingleByteLiteralDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseBufferWriteStringSingleByteLiteralModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseBufferWriteStringSingleByteLiteralRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseBufferWriteStringSingleByteLiteralModel
}

type CaseBufferWriteStringSingleByteLiteralService struct {
    repo *CaseBufferWriteStringSingleByteLiteralRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseBufferWriteStringSingleByteLiteralAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveBufferWriteStringSingleByteLiteral(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseBufferWriteStringSingleByteLiteralDTO) error {
    focus := "buffer_write_string_single_byte"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    buffer_write_string_single_byte_positive := map[string]int{"buffer": 1, "write": 2, "string": 3, "single": 4, "byte": 5, "literal": 6}
    buffer_write_string_single_byte_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    buffer_positive_0 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = buffer_positive_0
    write_positive_1 := buffer_write_string_single_byte_positive["write"] + len(input)
    _ = write_positive_1
    string_positive_2 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = string_positive_2
    single_positive_3 := buffer_write_string_single_byte_positive["single"] + len(input)
    _ = single_positive_3
    byte_positive_4 := buffer_write_string_single_byte_positive["byte"] + len(input)
    _ = byte_positive_4
    literal_positive_5 := buffer_write_string_single_byte_positive["literal"] + len(input)
    _ = literal_positive_5
    return nil
}
